PowerShell($job = Start-Job { Set-Location "c:\\Users\\fdani\\Documents\\Progetti AI\\SITO-DEFINITIVO"; npm run preview }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; try { $r1 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:4173/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; Write-Output "IT / -> $\($r1.StatusCode\)"; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:4173/en/soluzioni/synapse" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; Write-Output "EN /en/soluzioni/synapse -> $\($r2.StatusCode\)"; $r3 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:4173/sitemap.xml" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; Write-Output "sitemap.xml -> $\($r3.StatusCode\), contains hreflang: $\($r3.Content -match 'hreflang=.en.'\)" } finally { Stop-Job $job; Remove-Job $job })
